channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: US-Iran ceasefire: Can pressure, incentives, and risks deliver a final deal
item.description: Can US‑Iran ceasefire hold for talks? Vance team, midterm politics, energy risks, Tehran seeks relief.

item.title: Lebanon mourns security forces killed in Israeli strike
item.description: Lebanon held funeral ceremonies for 13 members of the country’s State Security agency killed in an Israeli strike.

item.title: US-Iran talks on ending war begin in Pakistan
item.description: Discussions between Iran and US delegations begin following separate bilateral meetings with Pakistani prime minister.

item.title: Al Jazeera’s Diplomatic Editor outlines key issues in US-Iran talks
item.description: With US and Iranian officials set to meet in Pakistan, Al Jazeera’s James Bays outlines the sticking points ahead.

item.title: Video: JD Vance meets with Pakistani PM ahead of Iran talks
item.description: US officials have met Pakistani PM Shehbaz Sharif in Islamabad ahead of possible talks with Iran.

item.title: We need a regional agreement for the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: A governing arrangement for the strait can and must be developed based on law and fact.

item.title: Video: ‘Crucial talks’ says Al Jazeera reporter at US-Iran meeting venue
item.description: Talks involving officials from Iran and Pakistani mediators have begun in Islamabad.

item.title: At least seven Palestinians killed in Israeli attacks on Gaza
item.description: An early-morning strike hits a group of civilians in ​​Bureij camp as drones attack a tent in Khan Younis.

item.title: Israel rejects ceasefire with Hezbollah before Lebanon talks next week
item.description: At least 10 people, including three emergency workers, killed in latest Israeli attacks on southern Lebanon.

item.title: Israeli drone attack kills Palestinians near Gaza mosque
item.description: An Israeli drone attack near a mosque in central Gaza has killed at least 6 people.
